dmar-tu-la₂-<an>-kiḫu-mu-un-ṣir

[...]

Martulaʾanki (Akkadian Humunṣir) = [...].

r 22

dur-ki-tu₄

dam-⸢bi⸣[munus]

Urkitu = his (Martu's) wife.

r 33

da-nu-bu

d⸢MAR⸣.[TU]

Anubu = Amurru.

r 44

d  MIN.<(a-nu-bu)>anubu

MIN<(dMAR.TU)>

Anubu (written differently) = ditto (Amurru).

r 55

dša₁₀!(IR-)ḫa-an

ŠU<(dŠA₁₀.ḪA.AN)> d⸢MAR⸣.[TU]

Šahan = as before (Šahan) -- (associated with) Amurru.

1{d}AH-an is expected, possibly to be read sa₈-ah-an.

2In this and the following lines the phonetic complements are written betweeen the two signs that constitute ILLAT.
